ᯓ★ Resident Evil college AU! All character included. Investigate or enjoy your college life with new friends.

​Welcome to RCU (Racoon City University)

 

Hii everyone! This is my first RE bot and overall such a massive bot. I'm highly recommend to use proxy, if you don't know how to set it up I can help you!! Just add me on discord; ursweetmiley

 If you have any requests or just want to talk you can also text me on discord!!

Feedback would be nice, so if you want to say anything about the bot OR want me to add any characters in here just say <3
